summary: Add authentication gate to the Alpha Wins app so unauthenticated/unauthorized users are redirected
implementation:
1. apps/web/lib/app-registry.ts: Change alpha-wins entry from `auth: false` to `auth: true`.
2. apps/web/app/apps/alpha-wins/layout.tsx: Import `requireAppLayoutAccess` from `@/lib/require-app-layout-access`. Make the default export `async`. Call `await requireAppLayoutAccess("alpha-wins")` at the top of the function body.
3. apps/web/app/apps/alpha-wins/__tests__/layout.test.tsx: Create smoke tests following the age-of-apes/area-52/lighthouse pattern — mock `requireAppLayoutAccess`, test four cases: (a) calls requireAppLayoutAccess with "alpha-wins", (b) unauthenticated redirects to /login, (c) unauthorized redirects to /unauthorized, (d) authenticated user renders children.

testing.reason: Auth gate changes runtime behavior — unauthenticated users will be redirected. Smoke tests verify the layout calls the gate and handles redirect errors correctly.

verification.reason: Auth gate redirects require real Auth0 sessions and Supabase permission checks that cannot be exercised in a local Playwright test without full auth infrastructure. The unit tests adequately cover the behavior.
